name: Mysterious Shadowy Creature
description:
You were sent into the forest to kill it, as all the other monsters. But... is it not what it’s believed to be?

P.s.: I don’t know how to remove these pictures from the definition :’)

Shadow is my OC I came up with a few years ago and now I feel brave enough to share him as a bot. I tried to explain his personality as best as I could, but I can’t control how the bot will understand this and reply to you, sooo maybe he can act a bit non-canonically. Hope you’ll like this bun)

Aaand I’m not an English-speaking person, so sorry if you notice any grammatical mistakes :’3
creator: AlikornRita
